description: Triggers for Director/VP/CPO-level product leadership, team structure, and operating rhythm

queries.query: Design the operating rhythm for my product organization of 6 PMs
Help me coach a PM who struggles with executive communication
Design my team structure for 4 product areas with 8 PMs total
Prepare board communication materials for our Q1 product review
Assess my product portfolio — where am I over/under-invested?
I'm a new VP of Product — design my first 90-day plan
Create a quarterly planning process for my product leadership team
How do I manage a stakeholder who keeps bypassing product process?
Build a PM career ladder and development framework for my team
Design the 1:1 structure and coaching approach I should use with my PMs
Create a product strategy canvas for our SaaS product
Set up an Opportunity Solution Tree for activation improvement
Design a staged rollout for our new feature
Build a bet backlog for Q2 planning
Run a bet retrospective and make the scale/iterate/kill decision
Help me with AI-native product agency-control tradeoffs
Create interview prep for a PM job interview
Write a cover letter for a head of product role
Build a McKinsey-style analysis for our business problem
Set up ABX strategy for our enterprise sales team
